title: monocera obtusa
intro: Monocera obtusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar periwinkle or rosy periwinkle. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of alkaloids, particularly vinblastine and vincristine, which are used to treat various types of cancer. The health benefits of Monocera obtusa include its ability to prevent and treat certain types of leukemia and Hodgkin's lymphoma, as well as its potential to improve appetite and reduce nausea. Monocera obtusa is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in the production of pharmaceuticals.
